findings.title: Chrome Zero-Day Exploited in the Wild
findings.summary: High-severity use-after-free in Chromium CSS component actively exploited in the wild, first Chrome zero-day of 2026.

findings.title: BeyondTrust RCE Under Active Exploitation — CISA 3-Day Deadline
findings.affected_technology: BeyondTrust Remote Support (RS) & Privileged Remote Access (PRA)
findings.summary: Pre-auth OS command injection (CVSS 9.9) with public PoC, active exploitation, and CISA 3-day patch deadline; used in ransomware.

findings.title: Infostealer Malware Now Targeting OpenClaw AI Agent Secrets
findings.summary: Infostealers now harvesting OpenClaw config files containing API keys and auth tokens alongside traditional browser credential stores.

noted.summary: Stolen traveler data from earlier breach now for sale on dark web.
Ransomware infection disclosed; business data exposed.
